steps.title: Isolate the squared term
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $7g$ to isolate the term containing $x$:
$$f \cdot 7g = (10x)^2$$
$$7fg = (10x)^2$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Take the square root of both sides. Since $x$ is positive, use the positive square root:
$$\sqrt{7fg} = 10x$$
Divide both sides by 10:
$$x = \frac{\sqrt{7fg}}{10}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
